{x.preventDefault();if(!err&&e)fetch("/api",{method:"POST"})}} noValidate>
{err}
}

{x.preventDefault();if(!e)fetch("/api",{method:"POST"})}} noValidate>setN(x.target.value)} aria-invalid={!!e}/>{e&&

function @N@(){const [p,setP]=useState("");const [c,setC]=useState("");const e={p:!p?"Req":p.length<8?"Min 8":!/[A-Z]/.test(p)?"Need upper":"",c:!c?"Req":c!==p?"Mismatch":""};return <form noValidate><input type="password" value={p} onChange={x=>setP(x.target.value)} aria-invalid={!!e.p}/>{e.p&&<small role="alert" style={{color:"red"}}>{e.p}</small>}<input type="password" value={c} onChange={x=>setC(x.target.value)} placeholder="Confirm" aria-invalid={!!e.c}/>{e.c&&<small role="alert" style={{color:"red"}}>{e.c}</small>}<button disabled={!!e.p||!!e.c||!p}>Submit</button></form>}

{x.preventDefault();if(!e)onSubmit({p})}} noValidate>setP(x.target.value)} aria-invalid={!!e}/>{e&&{e}}
}
